---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent, skill, rule, template, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of what you want added or changed.

## Type

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] New template
- [ ] Improvement to existing component
- [ ] Other

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What workflow does it improve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include details such as:
- For agents: domain, tier, and expected responsibilities
- For skills: workflow, inputs, outputs, and approval points
- For rules or automations: what triggers them and what they validate

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Examples, references, or screenshots that help explain the request.
